positive: A majestic, symmetrical pattern of celestial bioluminescent flora and cosmic geometric mandalas. The composition must feature interlocking, highly detailed stylized leaves, stellar dust patterns, and abstract crescent moons, forming a central, repeating medallion motif. Style: Neo-art Deco mixed with sacred geometry, highly stylized vector illustration. Use strong, contrasting silhouettes—deep indigo background contrasted with vibrant emerald green, electric teal, and soft gold accents. The pattern should be perfect for textile printing, clean lines, and centered for maximum visual impact. High contrast, crisp edges, ultra-detailed, intricate symmetry.
